stage: M-J.4.4 step 3 -- Gate-C corpus, collect-fix-rejudge loop (paced, never one big burst)
clusters_fixed: innocent-under-suspicion LIES -> FIXED (sensitive variant given honesty_humility; judge confirms 'no innocent lies')
betrayal anger snap-recovery -> FIXED (renderer collapses oscillation into a sustained chill; no trailing composed; suspicion/betrayal both up to 4.0)

variant indistinguishability -> FIXED (kind<->variant pairing; NEW confide kind makes gossip vs discreet distinguishable -- judge confirms 'clearly distinguishable, unburdens vs holds back'; gossip now shows an observable withholding beat)

verdict: the Gate-C corpus + a PACED collect-fix-rejudge loop lifted the weak situations from 3.05/3.29 to 4.0/4.0; the two major clusters (innocent-lying, variant-indistinguishability) are confirmed fixed by the blind judge. Residuals are diminishing-returns renderer polish.
